mapper.select: -- 사업본부 코드로 활성 부서를 조회한다. SELECT d.department_id FROM departments d WHERE d.code = #{departmentCode} AND d.is_active = TRUE

-- 사업본부와 확률 기준으로 활성 수주확률 단계를 조회한다. SELECT ps.probability_stage_id, ps.probability, ps.name FROM probability_stages ps WHERE ps.department_id = #{departmentId} AND ps.probability = #{probability} AND ps.is_active = TRUE

-- 사업본부별 활성 수주확률 단계 목록을 조회한다. SELECT ps.probability_stage_id, ps.probability, ps.name FROM probability_stages ps WHERE ps.department_id = #{departmentId} AND ps.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY ps.display_order, ps.probability
mapper.insert: -- 신규 영업 사이트를 등록한다. INSERT INTO opportunities ( department_id, customer_name, project_name, owner_name, expected_order_period, expected_delivery_period, project_amount, probability_stage_id, status, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{departmentId}, #{customerName}, #{projectName}, #{ownerName}, #{expectedOrderPeriod}, #{expectedDeliveryPeriod}, #{projectAmount}, #{probabilityStageId}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{createdBy} )

-- 영업 사이트 등록 시 초기 진행 기록을 생성한다. INSERT INTO opportunity_progress ( opportunity_id, progress_date, probability_stage_id, content, created_by ) VALUES ( #{opportunityId}, #{progressDate}, #{probabilityStageId}, #{content}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: -- 최신 영업 진행 기록의 수주확률 단계를 영업 사이트 현재 단계에 반영한다. UPDATE opportunities SET probability_stage_id = #{probabilityStageId}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE opportunity_id = #{opportunityId}
mapper.select: -- 영업 사이트 상세 정보를 조회한다. SELECT o.opportunity_id, d.department_id, d.code AS department_code, d.name AS department_name, o.customer_name, o.project_name, o.owner_name, o.expected_order_period, o.expected_delivery_period, o.project_amount, o.status, ps.probability, ps.name AS probability_stage_name FROM opportunities o INNER JOIN departments d ON d.department_id = o.department_id INNER JOIN probability_stages ps ON ps.probability_stage_id = o.probability_stage_id WHERE o.opportunity_id = #{opportunityId}

-- 영업 사이트 날짜별 진행 기록을 조회한다. SELECT op.opportunity_progress_id, op.progress_date, ps.probability, ps.name AS probability_stage_name, op.content FROM opportunity_progress op INNER JOIN probability_stages ps ON ps.probability_stage_id = op.probability_stage_id WHERE op.opportunity_id = #{opportunityId} ORDER BY op.progress_date DESC, op.opportunity_progress_id DESC
